message:
🐛 fix YouTube playlist feed — add Invidious API fallback (#9573)

YouTube's RSS feed (/feeds/videos.xml?playlist_id=...) now returns 404,
breaking the Learn dropdown video list. Add Invidious API as primary
source with multiple instance failover, keeping RSS and yt-dlp as
fallbacks.

Fixes both Go handler (pkg/api/handlers/youtube.go) and Netlify
function (web/netlify/functions/youtube-playlist.mts).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
